data.body:
[operator-attested] behavioral-eval RUN COMPLETE (satisfies the RUBRIC BEHAVIORAL EVAL AC). Ran the live plan-review gate (post-merge, change 860) over N=5 samples on two fixtures:
- POSITIVE fixture e3bd-8cd2-35f1-406b: plan cites 'AnalyzerResult [rebar:3b30-2168-ba16-41fc]' WITH a depends_on edge to 3b30, whose file_impact covers src/rebar/metrics/analyzer.py (coverage present). Result: the AnalyzerResult missing-symbol grounding finding was SUPPRESSED (credited) in 5/5 samples.
- NEGATIVE fixture 1773-c917-7130-4f65: same plan/symbol but cites 'AnalyzerResult [rebar:1a05-e3a8-207f-462a]' (the T8 bug, no covering file_impact) with NO edge. Result: the missing-symbol finding STOOD in 5/5 samples (fail-closed; no wrongful credit).
Pass-rate: POS credited 5/5 (100%), NEG stood 5/5 (100%); predeclared threshold >=80% CLEARED on both. Confirms the Layer-2 coverage protocol credits a verified+covered citation and withholds otherwise. Raw per-sample log: eval_results.txt (job scratch).
